RevisionEvent.Note: Only known prior ReleaseDate of the metadata
Added HelioData InformationURL, Updated to SPASE Version 2.7.1. JWL

ResourceHeader.Description: This entry represents the ensemble of all ground stations hosting magnetometers associated with the THEMIS spaceflight mission. Note that VMO has provided many station-specific descriptors to the SMWG observatory registry.

InformationURL.Name: THEMIS web site ground magnetometer page
InformationURL.Description: Up to date information on the THEMIS Ground Magnetometer Stations.

InformationURL.Name: Space Science REviews Article
InformationURL.Description: Description of THEMIS Ground Magnetometer Stations.

InformationURL.Name: HelioData
InformationURL.Description: The HelioData mission page provides an overview of the mission and more, such as all SPASE dataset records associated with it.
